Name: Angela Hood
Bio:
Angela Hood is the founder and CEO of ThisWay Global, an award-winning AI and high-performance computing (HPC) technology company revolutionizing industries with innovative solutions and seamless AI adoption strategies. A proud graduate of Texas A&M University's College of Architecture (Construction Sciences), Angela has been recognized as a Texas A&M Outstanding Alumni for her global contributions to innovation. 

Her groundbreaking work in AI has earned her a place on Forbes' 50 Over 50, as well as Inc. Magazine's Most Innovative Founders in 2024, among numerous accolades from technical and scientific publications worldwide. 

Under her leadership, ThisWay Global was selected for the prestigious Google Accelerator program in 2021, building on R&D incubated at the University of Cambridge's ideaSpace from 2012-2016. 

Initially focused on talent selection technology, ThisWay Global now serves hundreds of organizations and leads in providing advanced AI and HPC solutions through strategic partnerships with NVIDIA, Amazon Web Services, TD Synnex, Microsoft and IBM.

Name: Stephan Fabel
Bio: Stephan Fabel is the Chief Executive Officer of ThisWay Global, a Google-accelerated, VC-backed leader in AI-powered high-performance cloud computing. With more than 30 years in the technology industry and a distinguished background in computer engineering, robotics, and cloud AI infrastructure, Stephan brings significant executive experience to driving product strategy, organizational growth, and large-scale digital transformation for global enterprises. Before joining ThisWay Global, Stephan held senior leadership roles at NVIDIA and other leading Silicon Valley technology companies, where he led cross-functional teams at the forefront of artificial intelligence, open-source cloud computing, and enterprise platform development. Originally from Germany, Stephan's career has spanned both Europe and the United States since 1998, integrating deep technical expertise with a passion for driving innovation.

Name: Alex Shmelev
Role: CInO and CTO (Chief Innovation and Technology Officer)
Bio:
Alex Shmelev, Chief Innovation and Technology Officer at ThisWay Global, where he leads the development of AI, machine learning, and data integration technologies to enhance unbiased job and candidate matching solutions. 
Since joining ThisWay in 2017, he has advanced AI and NLP innovations, launched AI4JOBS and Sully's Sandbox (LLM adoption), and integrated ThisWay's technology into IBM's watsonx core AI platform. 
Prior to joining ThisWay, Alex served as Chief Enterprise Architect at NerdWallet, designing AI-driven personalization systems, and at CORT/Berkshire Hathaway, developing serverless IoT solutions. 
His career includes impactful projects for global leaders like KPMG, Disney, and MobiTV, where he built distributed analytics and real-time messaging platforms. 
As VP of Pharmacy Systems at Drugstore.com, he developed the infrastructure for the first nationwide online pharmacy. With over 40 years of experience, Alex holds multiple patents in secure data transmission, big data analytics, and customer experience optimization, earning prestigious awards such as SHRM's Innovative Technology Award and the Smithsonian Software Technology Award.

Name: Justin Hood
Bio:
Justin Hood, Chief Operating Officer for ThisWay Global, is a seasoned operations professional with a diverse, global business acumen encompassing military, construction, and corporate leadership roles. After earning his B.S. in Construction Science from Texas A&M University, he accepted a commission in the US Marine Corps. He served as an F/A-18 fighter pilot and managed aircraft, material, and personnel, culminating in his being selected as Executive Officer of his fighter squadron and achieving the rank of Lt Colonel.

Following his active duty, he continued his service in the USMC Reserve while also pursuing a career in land development as Vice President of Operations. 

He later transitioned back to the defense sector, managing US Air Force combat training operations in Europe (UK, Germany, Italy) and providing subject matter expertise for the Marine Corps and Navy. 

Since 2016, he has leveraged his extensive operational experience to oversee Legal, Compliance, HR, and Finance at ThisWay. 

His having held top secret security clearance with the US Department of Defense provides ThisWay Global with strong positioning in governmental discussions and will provide extraordinary advantages when negotiating public sector deals across the globe.

Name: Christian Kennedy
Bio:
Chris Kennedy, Distinguished AI/HPC Architect for ThisWay Global, is a seasoned technology leader with over four decades of experience architecting and implementing advanced software systems across industries including machine intelligence, FinTech, agriculture, energy/utilities, and biotech. His leadership roles range from Vice President of Engineering to Chief Technology Officer, specializing in high-performance computing, distributed systems, secure architectures, and machine intelligence. 

Currently serving as Distinguished AI/HPC Architect at ThisWay Global, Chris oversees the integration of AI technologies with a strong emphasis on ethical and responsible use. Known for his expertise in trusted systems and regulatory frameworks such as GDPR, CCPA, and ISO standards, he has driven business process reengineering in both startups and large enterprises. 

Chris's pioneering work includes developing the first distributed operating system to undergo B2-level evaluation, the first relational database evaluated at the B1 level, leveraging AI for image analysis, and advancing eventual consistency and agent-based systems. 

A passionate mentor and hands-on leader, Chris is committed to fostering high-performance virtual teams and delivering innovative, secure, sustainable solutions, while prioritizing scalability.

Name: Lisa Rawls
Bio:
Lisa P. Rawls, Chief Financial Officer for ThisWay Global is also the founder of Evergreen CFO, an outsourced CFO firm serving businesses in Georgia, Florida and Texas since 1995. 

With over 35 years of experience in commercial banking, executive management, angel investment management, and financial consulting, she specializes in providing high-level financial expertise to start-ups, rapidly growing companies.

Lisa provides customized solutions in cash flow management, strategic planning, banking and finance, accounting, and risk management. She also advises on equity, mergers and acquisitions. 

Her experience spans industries such as manufacturing, wholesale, distribution, technology, medical, and nonprofit sectors. A Georgia Tech Industrial Management graduate and Atlanta native, Lisa remains actively involved in civic, nonprofit, economic development, and entrepreneurial initiatives.

Name: Craig Peters
Bio: Craig Peters is a passionate Chief Product Officer at ThisWay Global who is energized by finding and building connections in technology. With extensive experience in cloud computing, open source software, and product development, Craig specializes in bringing innovative solutions to market. His expertise in product management and technology strategy helps drive Amalgamy.ai's product vision and market success. Craig's ability to bridge technical capabilities with customer needs makes him a valuable leader in shaping the future of AI/HPC orchestration.

Name: Kim Gullickson
Bio:
Kim Michael Gullickson, MBA, Director of AI & HPC Markets at ThisWay Global, is a seasoned executive with deep experience building high-performing sales teams and driving profitable growth across both startups and large public companies. 

Kim is known for his fair management style, creative deal-making, and strong leadership, and for instituting business operations that shape the profitability and strategic direction of the companies he serves. His specialties include competitive analysis, complex deal structures, service level agreements, channel management, compensation plan design, consultative sales, new business development, and customer account management. 

Prior to ThisWay Global, Kim served in senior revenue leadership roles including Chief Revenue Officer at ORock Technologies. He holds an MBA from the C.T. Bauer College of Business at the University of Houston and is based in Cypress, Texas.
